content:
- Finished task-02-quickstart-docs and pushed commit 3fe1a62 to origin/master.
- Added README.md as the canonical quickstart, updated examples/k8s/README.md to point back to it, marked the Ralph task/plan complete, switched tasks, committed, and pushed.
- Validation evidence: make check, make lint, make test, docker compose quickstart flow, benchmark API curls, docker build -t pg_gobench:local ., and direct scratch-image verification on port 18080 all passed.
